conclusion: Southwest Florida CRE is bifurcating. Naples corridors are tightening — Airport-Pulling South at $60.84/sqft with 4.9% vacancy. Lee County is showing permit oversaturation in Cape Coral (z-score 2.4) and Del Prado (2.1). Proceed with caution on multi-family land in Cape Coral; Naples retail is undersupplied.
caveats: absorption_sqft is null on 2 large-format corridors — vacancy figures are estimated.
ZHVF model projects -2.0% to -2.3% YoY value decline in Cape Coral / Fort Myers by April 2027.
